connectors.purpose: Primary framework for all decisions in this skill — DA 2 filter, modifier formula, keyword tiers, traffic model, SERP pass criteria, campaign and cluster formulation rules. Every output decision references this document.
Informs which content types and quality signals are required for a page to rank — ensures keyword assignments map to pages that can actually compete, not just pages that exist.

Defines the two page types that receive keyword assignments (game pages and ranked list pages) and their URL structures — ensures cluster and game page keyword assignments are formatted correctly and internally linked.
Informs intent analysis — understanding who the searcher is helps identify whether a query is list intent, game-specific intent, or question intent, which determines which page type should target it.
